title: StcObservation
description: A self-verifier finding emitted by core/save_the_cat.py:verify(). Per save-the-cat-sketch-01 S6 + sketch-02 S13 + production-format-sketch-12 PFS12-O1..O4. Third instance of the four-field structural-finding shape — parallels schema/lowering/lowering_observation.json (PFS9-LO) and schema/aristotelian/observation.json (PFS11-AO). severity is a closed two-value enum; code is an open non-empty string (S6 + S13 emit twenty-three stable codes today but the schema is extension-safe for new checks without amendment — code close-enum deferred to PFS12 OQ1). target_id names an intra-dialect record (StcStory / StcBeat / StcStrand / StcCharacter id depending on the emitting check); resolution banked as PFS12 OQ2.

severity.description: Closed enum matching core/save_the_cat.py SEVERITY_NOTED / SEVERITY_ADVISES_REVIEW. noted = observation recorded, no review required; advises-review = check uncovered a structural issue the author should see. PFS12-O2.

code.description: Short stable tag identifying the check that emitted this observation. Today's codes (sketch-01 S6 + sketch-02 S13): 'beat_id_unresolved', 'strand_id_unresolved', 'genre_unknown', 'theme_statement_empty', 'beat_slot_unfilled', 'multiple_beats_per_slot', 'page_actual_non_monotonic', 'multiple_a_strands', 'multiple_b_strands', 'advancement_strand_unresolved', 'genre_archetypes_declared', 'character_id_unresolved', 'participant_id_unresolved', 'focal_character_id_unresolved', 'archetype_character_id_unresolved', 'character_unreferenced', 'multiple_protagonists', 'no_protagonist_declared', 'archetype_assignment_both_set', 'archetype_assignment_neither_set', 'archetype_assignments_without_genre', 'archetype_missing', 'archetype_duplicated', 'archetype_extraneous'. Open string per PFS12-O3 — new checks don't require a schema amendment. Code vocabulary closure deferred to PFS12 OQ1.

target_id.description: Intra-dialect record id (StcStory / StcBeat / StcStrand / StcCharacter) this observation targets. Referential-integrity audit banked as PFS12 OQ2. PFS12-O4.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the finding. No length constraint. PFS12-O4.
